message.content:
@startuml
title Update PractitionerRole

actor "Integrating application user" as User1 at 0%
participant "<color:white> Integrating application </color>" as App1 #6495ED at 23%
participant "<FHIR API> HPI\n<white><size:8>\n</size></white>" as FhirApi #6495ED at 70%
database "HPI Practitioner Role database \n <white><size:8>\n</size></white>" as Db #6495ED at 90%


User1 -> App1 :Update PractitionerRole using hpi-practitionerrrole-id 
App1->FhirApi:<b>PUT<b/> <<Endpoint>> /PractitionerRole/[hpi-practitionerrrole-id] 

activate FhirApi  
    activate App1
    
        note right of FhirApi::Validate[]\n
        
            validate practitioner role data
            
            
        
         endnote 
    
     loop Validate[ ]    
          alt Valid Data   
             else Invalid Data     
                return Error response       
           endif      
      endloop
      
       request Request to DB from FhirApi over Db
     
return HTTP 200 reponse 


deactivate FhirApi  

'== End ==



@enduml
